headline: Tesla Analysts Brace For Q3 Sales Beat, Rivian Loses A Bull, Canoo Drives Across The Atlantic And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Tesla stock's resurgence and China stimulus that perked up startups from the country, added to the buoyancy imparted by the broader market strength.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Apple, Tesla, Novo Nordisk, Bitcoin — And Shiba Inu's Major Stablecoin Tease
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The Dow Jones Industrial Average hit a record high Friday as investors analyzed data showing continued progress in lowering inflation. Wall Street posted its third straight week of gains.

headline: Tim Cook-Led Apple Reportedly Abandons OpenAI Funding Round Discussions, But Nvidia And Microsoft Could Still Invest In ChatGPT-Parent
summary: Apple has reportedly withdrawn from last-minute negotiations to invest in OpenAI's $6.5 billion funding round, which is still expected to include contributions from Microsoft and Nvidia.

headline: Meta Fined $100M For Storing Over Half A Billion Passwords In Plaintext: Mark Zuckerberg-Led Company Reportedly Had 2000 Employees Querying Them 9M Times
summary: Meta Platforms has been fined $101.5 million by Ireland's Data Protection Commission (DPC) for a 2019 security breach.

headline: OpenAI Plans To More Than Double ChatGPT Price Over Next 5 Years: Report
summary: OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, will reportedly increase the chatbot's price by 10% this year, and more than double it to $44 over the next five years.
